i take profits bcs we are at extremes, and the time is passing. 
i wanna lock as much extrinsic value as i can.
and as said in the yesterday post, i will look for a re-entry. 
I still believe that we gonna see a supportive OpEx, we'll check the inventories once i'm there.. and after boom... that would be a good opportunity to by... 
also we have event vol now. the distirbution is somehow shifting towards event vol crush. that would cause a weaker vanna squeeze, if the models are right. market needs more fuel to the downside, otherwise no vol event. everybody is hedged, everybody is on the put trade, JPM is magnetic etc. market needs fresh liquidity

comment.body: I'm sure things get rough when your port starts to decay. But Alma has never been a signal poster. She posts levels and data to help you throughout the day and week with trades. Shes never going to say buy here and sell there. If youre subscribed to this substack expecting her to hold your hand and tell you exactly when you should or should not buy and sell, then youre in the wrong place! Obviously everyone has the right to talk in these chats as we are all paid subscribers, but its not considerate to any of the rest of us when you are blowing up the chat CONSTANTLY all day making requests and voicing unwarranted expectations of Alma, when that isnt what this substack is for. Please take a step back and stop spamming the chat with each and every one of your complaints throughout the trading day. It is of no help to any of us, including yourself!

comment.body:
Good read. Everyone is hedged. Everyone has had time to hedge. And it’s been a controlled decline so far. 

In my opinion, it can whipsaw back up in days. And that’ll be the time to look for downside protection again. But if it doesn’t, there’s never any harm in cash. You don’t need to take a trade every day
